title: One task needed on 2 boards
excerpt: I work with several cross functional teams where 1 task needs to be visible on 2 separate boards. Is there a way to tag an item to have it populate on 2 boards?

posts.author: KBat (Karen Battist)
posts.cookedHtml: I work with several cross functional teams where 1 task needs to be visible on 2 separate boards. Is there a way to tag an item to have it populate on 2 boards?

posts.author: kaylak (Kayla K)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @KBat ,

Have you used the mirror column for this use case? I’ll link some documentation on using the mirror column below.

Support

The Mirror Column

5 min read Feature     Need to store the same information in multiple places across your account? Want to update separate columns without the hassle of doing double the work? By connecting ...

posts.author: KBat (Karen Battist)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you for your response. I am aware of the mirror column option however, I would like to have just one task seen on 2 boards, not an entire board mirrored. Is there an option for that?
